column1: I (to finish) reading this articles by 6 o'clock tomorrow.
... I ... (to finish) writing this book by next month?
... he ... (to get married) by next summer?
... it ... (to get) colder by next morning?
... they ... (to leave) their jobs by that time next year?
She (to forget) about her promise in five years.
They (to retire) when their children grow up.
I (not to read) that book by next week.
We (not to find) the replacement for our manager until we provide good perks.
